- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

socketedItems.secDescrText: Animates a melee weapon or armour, attaching it to an invisible Guardian that fights by your side using Smite of Divine Judgement, ignoring weapon restrictions. If your Guardian dies you cannot summon an Animated Guardian again in that area.
